system.duration: 1 day, or until the end of the battle.
system.effect: Upon successfully casting this spell in front of allied warriors, those who witness the ritual's magicks are imbued with fighting zeal: they gain a +1 bonus to all morale checks in a looming battle. However, these warriors will also be more difficult to control once the fighting begins: apply a -2 penalty whenever attempting to re-organize any warriors filled with Zeal for Battle.
system.critSuccess: The affected warriors gain a +1 bonus to damage rolls as well.
